message:
perf(channel,time): #[inline] watch channel accessors + Sleep deadline/is_elapsed/remaining

Watch Sender: borrow, receiver_count, is_closed.
Watch Receiver: borrow, borrow_and_clone, mark_seen, has_changed, is_closed.
Sleep: deadline, remaining, is_elapsed — called on every timer check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
